name: remote-canvas-mcp
description: Connect Codex to Canvas LMS through the remote Canvas MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Use Canvas courses, assignments, grades, and more
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to a remote Canvas LMS MCP server deployed on Cloudflare Workers. Each user authorizes with their own Canvas domain and API token, which are stored encrypted by the Worker.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my Canvas dashboard and upcoming assignments
List assignments due this week across my courses
Check my Canvas grades and highlight missing work
